SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: NCPDP_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 7 

SOURCE: PDE and NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: Null/missing 
5-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2014. Beginning with 2014 data, the NCPDP_ID is used in place of the 
CCW_PHARM_ID in the Part D Pharmacy Characteristics File. Researchers who received CCW data 
from 2006–2013 and wish to identify the NCPDP_ID associated with
